positive: A vibrant, minimalist tropical getaway scene featuring stylized palm fronds and gentle wave patterns, forming a seamless repeating pattern. The composition should be highly symmetrical and centered, using clean silhouettes of tropical foliage against a solid, bright cyan background. Use a limited color palette of deep teal, coral orange, and lime green. The style should mimic mid-century modern graphic design, emphasizing bold lines, flat colors, and clear negative space, ideal for screen printing on t-shirts. Vector art quality, high contrast, perfect tessellation, graphic novel aesthetic.
negative: blur, low resolution, watermark, text, signature, gradient, photo, realistic, messy, artifacts, bad anatomy, grain, jpeg artifacts, noise, extra limbs
